parameters.query: SELECT id, status, gcal_event_id FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text LIMIT 1;

parameters.end: ={{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + ($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.duration_minutes || 60) * 60000).toISOString() }}
parameters.summary: ={{ $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.event_title || 'Reserva: ' + ($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.customer_id || $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO bookings (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, idempotency_key, gcal_event_id, user_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::timestamp, $4::timestamp, $5::text, $6::text, COALESCE(NULLIF($7::bigint, 0), 5391760292), 'CONFIRMED', NOW()) RETURNING id;
